name: spss_mcp
description: Professional SPSS processing MCP server for market research. Upload .sav/.csv/.xlsx files, get crosstabs with significance testing, auto-detected question types, correlation, ANOVA, gap analysis, and publication-ready Excel exports. AI-powered zero-config analysis.

authorization.description: API key (sk_live_... or sk_test_...). Get one at https://spss.insightgenius.io

tools.name: spss_upload_file
tools.description: Upload .sav/.csv/.xlsx file, get reusable file_id (30-min session)

tools.name: spss_get_metadata
tools.description: Variable metadata + AI-detected banners, groups, nets

tools.name: spss_describe_variable
tools.description: Deep single-variable profile: distribution, labels, missing

tools.name: spss_get_server_info
tools.description: Engine status, available tools, plan limits

tools.name: spss_analyze_anova
tools.description: One-way ANOVA with Tukey HSD post-hoc comparisons

tools.name: spss_summarize_satisfaction
tools.description: Compact T2B/B2B/Mean summary for scale variables

tools.name: spss_auto_analyze
tools.description: Zero-config: upload file, get complete Excel with AI-detected analysis

tools.name: spss_create_tabulation
tools.description: Full professional Excel tabulation with sig, nets, means, MRS, grids
